description: Multiple PHP remote file inclusion vulnerabilities in openMairie Openfoncier 2.00, when register_globals is enabled, allow remote attackers to execute arbitrary PHP code via a URL in the path_om parameter to (1) action.class.php, (2) architecte.class.php, (3) avis.class.php, (4) bible.class.php, and (5) blocnote.class.php in obj/.
